Appearances:
Eliot A. Bennion, of Schlichter & Schonack, LLP, Tel. 310.643.0111, for defendants CarMax, appearing via CourtCall;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was discussed. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CARMAX AUTO SUPERSTORES WEST COAST, INC. Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs
Joha-Marie Thomas's First Amended Complaint is taken off calendar in light of the court's ruling on Carmax's demurrer which disposes of the only cause of action asserted against Carmax in the complaint.
